name: Pumpernickel Pus Lumps
recipeInstructions:
1. Carefully drain the capers through a colander over the sink.
2. Place the drained capers in a bowl.
3. Scoop the cream cheese into the bowl with the capers and mix gently.
4. Toast the bread until crispy.
5. Spread each toasted slice of Pumpernickel bread with a generous amount of the pus lumps mixture.
6. Serve open-faced immediately.
Serves 4 infectous friends.
